main.title: reasons to trade
main.desc: Here are 5 reasons why you too should consider trading Cryptocurrencies with IQ Option:
main.one:
24/7/365
There are no official Cryptocurrency exchanges, because these digital assets are traded all around the globe and round the clock. That means, you can open or close a deal whenever you want!
main.two:
Accessible
No need for complicated registration and verification procedures, mind-boggling transactions or high purchasing and transfer fees. Everything can be done either instantly or in a couple of clicks.
main.three:
Controllable
The Auto-closing Option allows you to better manage risks by setting up a safety net of Stop-loss and Take-profit parameters on each deal. You have control over the trades even when you’re away.
main.four:
Safe
There’s no risk that your crypto-wallet will be hacked or your funds will be stolen when you’re purchasing a cryptocurrency from a fraudulent supplier.
main.five:
Scalable
When you’re trading Cryptocurrencies with IQ Option, you get to use an Investment Multiplier. That means you get to invest up to 10x the amount you have on hand. And the best part? Your returns will also be multiplied accordingly!*
main.blog-text: Read the hottest stock overviews on the IQ Option Blog
main.asterisk: *Please Note: Applying an investment multiplier increases the amount lost in case of an incorrect prediction. Your losses, however, will never go beyond the amount invested.
